headline: Rivian’s Also DoorDash Deal Tests Autonomy Platform Beyond Vehicle Sales
summary: Rivian spinoff Also secured a $200 million Series C funding round linked to a new partnership with DoorDash. The multi year agreement will deploy small autonomous EVs for deliveries across selected markets. DoorDash will take a board role at Also, aligning the delivery platform with Rivian related autonomy and EV technology. For Rivian Automotive (NasdaqGS:RIVN), this development arrives as the share price sits at $15.05, with the stock showing a 13.3% gain over the past year but a 22.5%...
